recalls.Description: This recall involves the DTR Plush Bag Stitch and DTR Plush Bag Angel. The Stitch plush bags were sold in blue and the Angel bags were sold in purple. The bags measure about 10 inches long and 8 inches wide, with a swing tag care label that hangs off the side of the bag.
recalls.Title: Primark Recalls DTR Plush Bag Stitch and DTR Plush Bag Angel Due to Choking and Ingestion Hazards
recalls.ConsumerContact: Primark collect at 617-946-3236 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, or online at www.primark.com/recall or at www.primark.com and click on "Recall" at the bottom of the page for more information.

Products.Name: DTR Plush Bag Stitch and DTR Plush Bag Angel

Images.Caption: Recalled Primark DTR Plush Bag - Stitch
Recalled Primark DTR Plush Bag - Angel

Retailers.Name: Primark stores located in the northeast and in Florida, Maryland and Illinois from March 2024 through October 2024 for about $6.

Importers.Name: Primark US Corp., of Boston, Massachusetts

Hazards.Name: The zipper pull on the back of the plush bags can detach, posing a risk of serious injury or death from choking and/or ingestion of the zipper pull.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately take the recalled plush bags away from children, stop using them and return them to a Primark store for a full refund in the form of the original payment.
